summary: Iteration 3 testing of Joli marketplace MVP — verified footer link fix, sharper hero image (w=1600), and the brand new admin user management at /dashboard/admin/users (UI + 3 new APIs). 14/14 v3 backend tests pass; 23/23 v2 regression pass (37/37 total). Frontend: all 7 footer links navigate correctly, /dashboard/admin/users renders with role tabs (all/practitioner/client/admin), search narrows to Blessing, 5 practitioner rows show studio name + ★ rating + bookings + Suspend toggle, activity feed shows 27 events. Suspend → public /api/practitioners hides Blessing → reinstate → she reappears (round-trip verified). Non-admin users get 403 on /api/admin/users and /api/admin/activity. Hero image src confirmed w=1600 quality=92.

minor.issue: Public list response does NOT include a 'slug' field on each practitioner — uses 'direct_booking_slug'. Detail endpoint by-slug uses /practitioners/slug/{slug}. Minor consistency note; not blocking. Detail-by-id response shape is fine.

issues: React console warning: 'Invalid DOM property fetchpriority. Did you mean fetchPriority?' — minor; comes from an attribute. Non-blocking.

action_items: (LOW) Fix img fetchpriority -> fetchPriority React prop casing to silence console warning.
(LOW) Consider returning 'slug' alias for direct_booking_slug in public /api/practitioners list to match common REST convention.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1141 lines — well above the 700-line threshold flagged in iteration 2. Splitting into routers/ (auth, practitioners, bookings, blog, verifications, admin, admin_users) is overdue and should happen before adding the next feature.

GET /api/admin/users loops awaits for bookings_count and practitioner enrichment serially in Python (lines 845-861). For 500 users this is N*2 DB round-trips; consider $lookup aggregation or asyncio.gather(...) for scale. Acceptable for current MVP size (<100 users).
PUT /api/admin/practitioners/{id}/suspend writes suspended_at = None when un-suspending — preserves audit trail correctly. Good.
GET /api/practitioners filter q={'is_suspended': {'$ne': True}} correctly hides suspended practitioners (verified by round-trip suspend/reinstate test).

Activity feed mixes 4 event kinds and sorts by 'at' desc in-memory after combining — correct, but if event volume grows the limit(15)+limit(20)+limit(10)+limit(10) per-source could miss recent events of one type; consider per-kind capping + global sort or use a unified activity collection later.
AdminUsersPage.jsx uses Promise.all for /admin/users + /admin/activity — good UX. window.prompt for suspension reason is a quick MVP shortcut; replace with shadcn Dialog before production.
seed_data_creation: Suspend test toggles Blessing's is_suspended on & off — state restored to FALSE at end of test (verified via final GET /api/practitioners). No leftover data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 finished at 37/37 backend + 100% frontend. Important: GET /api/practitioners response uses 'direct_booking_slug' NOT 'slug' — don't write tests that expect 'slug'. Auth cookie-vs-Bearer gotcha from iteration 2 still applies — keep using fresh requests.request() calls in tests (see _auth helper in test_joli_v3_admin.py). Suspend round-trip leaves DB clean. Admin verification queue may still be empty (most items approved from iteration 2). Hero image now uses w=1600 q=92 — keep this if the file is touched.
rca of the issue: Only one test-script failure during the run: I initially asserted 'blessing-braids-yyc' in slugs (from /api/practitioners), but that endpoint returns 'direct_booking_slug' not 'slug', so slugs={None}. Fix was a test-only change (compare on display_name lowercased). No production code change required.
